heading: Taking of appeal; notice; time—(Rule)
label: 3732 Taking of appeal; notice; time—(Rule)
notes: See Federal Rules of Criminal ProcedureTaking appeal; notice, contents, signing; time, Rule 37(a).

References in TextRule 37 of the Federal Rules of Criminal Procedure was abrogated , eff. , and is covered by Rule 3, Federal Rules of Appellate Procedure, set out in the Appendix to Title 28, Judiciary and Judicial Procedure.Dec. 4, 1967July 1, 1968
